titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

segments: إِذَا كَانَ الْعَبْدُ وَ امْرَأَتُهُ لِرَجُلٍ وَاحِدٍ فَإِنَّ الْمَوْلَى يَأْخُذُهَا إِذَا شَاءَ وَ إِذَا شَاءَ رَدَّهَا

وَ قَالَ لَا يَجُوزُ طَلَاقُ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا كَانَ هُوَ وَ امْرَأَتُهُ لِرَجُلٍ وَاحِدٍ إِلَّا أَنْ يَكُونَ الْعَبْدُ لِرَجُلٍ وَ الْمَرْأَةُ لِرَجُلٍ وَ تَزَوَّجَهَا بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ وَ إِذْنِ مَوْلَاهَا فَإِنْ طَلَّقَ وَ هُوَ بِهَذِهِ الْمَنْزِلَةِ فَإِنَّ طَلَاقَهُ جَائِزٌ .
arabic.text:
إِذَا كَانَ الْعَبْدُ وَ امْرَأَتُهُ لِرَجُلٍ وَاحِدٍ فَإِنَّ الْمَوْلَى يَأْخُذُهَا إِذَا شَاءَ وَ إِذَا شَاءَ رَدَّهَا

وَ قَالَ لَا يَجُوزُ طَلَاقُ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا كَانَ هُوَ وَ امْرَأَتُهُ لِرَجُلٍ وَاحِدٍ إِلَّا أَنْ يَكُونَ الْعَبْدُ لِرَجُلٍ وَ الْمَرْأَةُ لِرَجُلٍ وَ تَزَوَّجَهَا بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ وَ إِذْنِ مَوْلَاهَا فَإِنْ طَلَّقَ وَ هُوَ بِهَذِهِ الْمَنْزِلَةِ فَإِنَّ طَلَاقَهُ جَائِزٌ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If there was the slave and his wife for one man (master), so is the master takes her when he so desires to, and when he so desires to, he returns her’.

And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce of the slave is not allowed when he and his wife were for one man (master), except if the slave happens to be for a man, and the slave girl for (another) man, and he married her by the permission of his master and the permission of her master. So if he divorces, and he is by this status, so his divorce is allowed’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If there was the slave and his wife for one man (master), so is the master takes her when he so desires to, and when he so desires to, he returns her’.

And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce of the slave is not allowed when he and his wife were for one man (master), except if the slave happens to be for a man, and the slave girl for (another) man, and he married her by the permission of his master and the permission of her master. So if he divorces, and he is by this status, so his divorce is allowed’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي الصَّبَّاحِ الْكِنَانِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْعَبْدِ هَلْ يَجُوزُ طَلَاقُهُ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَتْ أَمَتَكَ فَلَا إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَقُولُ عَبْداً مَمْلُوكاً لا يَقْدِرُ عَلى شَيْ‏ءٍ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ أَمَةَ قَوْمٍ آخَرِينَ أَوْ حُرَّةً جَازَ طَلَاقُهُ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْعَبْدِ هَلْ يَجُوزُ طَلَاقُهُ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَتْ أَمَتَكَ فَلَا إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَقُولُ عَبْداً مَمْلُوكاً لا يَقْدِرُ عَلى شَيْ‏ءٍ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ أَمَةَ قَوْمٍ آخَرِينَ أَوْ حُرَّةً جَازَ طَلَاقُهُ .

segments: Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Fazzal Bin Salih, from Lays Al Murady who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the slave, is his divorce allowed?’ So heasws said: ‘If she was a bondmaid, so no. Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic is Saying [16:75] a slave, the property of another, (who) has no power over anything. If she was a bondmaid of another people, or a free woman, his divorce is allowed’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Fazzal Bin Salih, from Lays Al Murady who said, ‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the slave, is his divorce allowed?’ So heasws said: ‘If she was a bondmaid, so no. Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic is Saying [16:75] a slave, the property of another, (who) has no power over anything. If she was a bondmaid of another people, or a free woman, his divorce is allowed’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدٌ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ مُفَضَّلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ لَيْثٍ الْمُرَادِيِّ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَأْذَنُ لِعَبْدِهِ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجَ الْحُرَّةَ أَوْ أَمَةَ قَوْمٍ الطَّلَاقُ إِلَى السَّيِّدِ أَوْ إِلَى الْعَبْدِ قَالَ الطَّلَاقُ إِلَى الْعَبْدِ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَأْذَنُ لِعَبْدِهِ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجَ الْحُرَّةَ أَوْ أَمَةَ قَوْمٍ الطَّلَاقُ إِلَى السَّيِّدِ أَوْ إِلَى الْعَبْدِ قَالَ الطَّلَاقُ إِلَى الْعَبْدِ .

segments: Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Jameel Bin Salih, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the man who permits his slave that he marries the free woman, or a slave girl, would the divorced be fixed to the master or to the slave?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is up to the slave’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Jameel Bin Salih, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the man who permits his slave that he marries the free woman, or a slave girl, would the divorced be fixed to the master or to the slave?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is up to the slave’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدٌ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ جَمِيلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ غُلَامُهُ جَارِيَةً حُرَّةً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْغُلَامِ فَإِنْ تَزَوَّجَهَا بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ فَالطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْمَوْلَى .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ غُلَامُهُ جَارِيَةً حُرَّةً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْغُلَامِ فَإِنْ تَزَوَّجَهَا بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ فَالطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْمَوْلَى .

segments: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Muhammad Bin Ziyad, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to a slave girl of a free woman. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is by the hand of the slave. So if he married her without the permission of his master, so the divorce is in the hand of the master’.
en.hubeali.text:
Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Muhammad Bin Ziyad, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to a slave girl of a free woman. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is by the hand of the slave. So if he married her without the permission of his master, so the divorce is in the hand of the master’.

narratorChain.raw: حُمَيْدُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ عَنِ ابْنِ سَمَاعَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ غُلَامُهُ جَارِيَةً حُرَّةً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْغُلَامِ
قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ زَوَّجَ أَمَتَهُ رَجُلًا حُرّاً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْحُرِّ
وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ زَوَّجَ غُلَامَهُ جَارِيَتَهُ فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْمَوْلَى
وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اشْتَرَى جَارِيَةً وَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ عَبْدٌ فَقَالَ بَيْعُهَا طَلَاقُهَا .
arabic.text:
سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ غُلَامُهُ جَارِيَةً حُرَّةً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْغُلَامِ

قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ زَوَّجَ أَمَتَهُ رَجُلًا حُرّاً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْحُرِّ

وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ زَوَّجَ غُلَامَهُ جَارِيَتَهُ فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْمَوْلَى

وَ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اشْتَرَى جَارِيَةً وَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ عَبْدٌ فَقَالَ بَيْعُهَا طَلَاقُهَا .

segments: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Ali Bin Yaqteen,

(It has been narrated) from Al-Abd Al-Salih<sup>asws</sup> (7th Imam<sup>asws</sup>), said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to a slave girls of a free man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the slave’.
He (the narrator) said, ‘And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave girl to a free man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the free man’.
And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to his slave girl. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the master’.
And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who bought a slave girl and for her was a slave husband. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sell her and divorce her’.
en.hubeali.text:
Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Ali Bin Yaqteen,

(It has been narrated) from Al-Abd Al-Salih<sup>asws</sup> (7th Imam<sup>asws</sup>), said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to a slave girls of a free man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the slave’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave girl to a free man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the free man’.

And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to his slave girl. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is in the hand of the master’.

And I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who bought a slave girl and for her was a slave husband. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sell her and divorce her’.

narratorChain.raw: حُمَيْدُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ عَنِ ابْنِ سَمَاعَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ يَقْطِينٍ عَنِ الْعَبْدِ الصَّالِحِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

segments: قُلْتُ لَهُ الرَّجُلُ يُزَوِّجُ أَمَتَهُ مِنْ رَجُلٍ حُرٍّ ثُمَّ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَنْزِعَهَا مِنْهُ وَ يَأْخُذَ مِنْهُ نِصْفَ الصَّدَاقِ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ الَّذِي زَوَّجَهَا مِنْهُ يُبْصِرُ مَا أَنْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَ يَدِينُ بِهِ فَلَهُ أَنْ يَنْزِعَهَا مِنْهُ وَ يَأْخُذَ مِنْهُ نِصْفَ الصَّدَاقِ لِأَنَّهُ قَدْ تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ عَلَى مَعْرِفَةِ أَنَّ ذَلِكَ لِلْمَوْلَى وَ إِنْ كَانَ الزَّوْجُ لَا يَعْرِفُ هَذَا وَ هُوَ مِنْ جُمْهُورِ النَّاسِ يُعَامِلُهُ الْمَوْلَى عَلَى مَا يُعَامَلُ بِهِ مِثْلُهُ فَقَدْ تَقَدَّمَ عَلَى مَعْرِفَةِ ذَلِكَ مِنْهُ .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ لَهُ الرَّجُلُ يُزَوِّجُ أَمَتَهُ مِنْ رَجُلٍ حُرٍّ ثُمَّ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَنْزِعَهَا مِنْهُ وَ يَأْخُذَ مِنْهُ نِصْفَ الصَّدَاقِ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ الَّذِي زَوَّجَهَا مِنْهُ يُبْصِرُ مَا أَنْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَ يَدِينُ بِهِ فَلَهُ أَنْ يَنْزِعَهَا مِنْهُ وَ يَأْخُذَ مِنْهُ نِصْفَ الصَّدَاقِ لِأَنَّهُ قَدْ تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ عَلَى مَعْرِفَةِ أَنَّ ذَلِكَ لِلْمَوْلَى وَ إِنْ كَانَ الزَّوْجُ لَا يَعْرِفُ هَذَا وَ هُوَ مِنْ جُمْهُورِ النَّاسِ يُعَامِلُهُ الْمَوْلَى عَلَى مَا يُعَامَلُ بِهِ مِثْلُهُ فَقَدْ تَقَدَّمَ عَلَى مَعْرِفَةِ ذَلِكَ مِنْهُ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub Al Khazzaz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The man married his slave girl to a free man, then he wanted to remove her from him, and take from him half the dower’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If the one who married her to him were to see what you all are upon and makes a religion by it, so for him is then he removes her from him, and takes from him half the dower, because he has proceeded from that upon the understanding that, that is the for master (to do), and if the husband does not understand this, and he is from the masses of the people, the master would deal with him upon what he deals with one similar to him, so he has preceded upon the understanding of that from him’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub Al Khazzaz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The man married his slave girl to a free man, then he wanted to remove her from him, and take from him half the dower’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If the one who married her to him were to see what you all are upon and makes a religion by it, so for him is then he removes her from him, and takes from him half the dower, because he has proceeded from that upon the understanding that, that is the for master (to do), and if the husband does not understand this, and he is from the masses of the people, the master would deal with him upon what he deals with one similar to him, so he has preceded upon the understanding of that from him’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ الْخَزَّازِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَنْكَحَ أَمَتَهُ حُرّاً أَوْ عَبْدَ قَوْمٍ آخَرِينَ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ لَهُ أَنْ يَنْزِعَهَا فَإِنْ بَاعَهَا فَشَاءَ الَّذِي اشْتَرَاهَا أَنْ يَنْزِعَهَا مِنْ زَوْجِهَا فَعَلَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَنْكَحَ أَمَتَهُ حُرّاً أَوْ عَبْدَ قَوْمٍ آخَرِينَ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ لَهُ أَنْ يَنْزِعَهَا فَإِنْ بَاعَهَا فَشَاءَ الَّذِي اشْتَرَاهَا أَنْ يَنْزِعَهَا مِنْ زَوْجِهَا فَعَلَ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave girl to a free man, or a slave of another people. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not for him that he can remove her. So if he were to sell her, so the one who buys wished to remove her from her husband, he can do it’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave girl to a free man, or a slave of another people. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not for him that he can remove her. So if he were to sell her, so the one who buys wished to remove her from her husband, he can do it’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
titles.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

segments: إِذَا كَانَ لِلرَّجُلِ أَمَةٌ فَزَوَّجَهَا مَمْلُوكَهُ فَرَّقَ بَيْنَهُمَا إِذَا شَاءَ وَ جَمَعَ بَيْنَهُمَا إِذَا شَاءَ .
arabic.text: إِذَا كَانَ لِلرَّجُلِ أَمَةٌ فَزَوَّجَهَا مَمْلُوكَهُ فَرَّقَ بَيْنَهُمَا إِذَا شَاءَ وَ جَمَعَ بَيْنَهُمَا إِذَا شَاءَ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from hafs Bin al Bakhtary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If there was a slave girl for a man, so he gets her married to an owned slave of him, so he can separate between them when he so desires to, and gathers between them when he so desires to’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from hafs Bin al Bakhtary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If there was a slave girl for a man, so he gets her married to an owned slave of him, so he can separate between them when he so desires to, and gathers between them when he so desires to’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ الْبَخْتَرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
